arts.ttl: Barcelona Set Sights on In-Demand Bologna Defender
arts.sum: Sought-after Bologna defender Jhon Lucumi has emerged as a concrete target for Barcelona ahead of the summer transfer window. According to Spanish outlet Diario AS, runaway La Liga leaders have earmarked the Colombian star as a summer objective. arts.ttl: Frenkie de Jong receives huge offer to leave Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong receives a huge offer from Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: ‘I’ve never had it easy here’ - Eric happy to have earned Flick’s trust at Barca
arts.sum: Eric Garcia has admitted life hasn’t always been easy for him at Barcelona but he’s happy to have grabbed the chance this season under Hansi Flick. Eric has played in defence and midfield this season but made it clear where his favourite position is on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea wonderkid offers advice to next generation after 'surreal' Barcelona moment
arts.sum: Former Chelsea academy talent Jack Cork enjoyed a successful Premier League career after leaving Stamford Bridge and is now showing the next generation of talent how to do it

arts.ttl: Leganes vs Barcelona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leganes, languishing in the relegation zone, face a daunting task as they host league leaders Barcelona in La Liga. The match kicks off at 20:00 on Saturday, April 12th, at Estadio Municipal de Butarq...

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona head to Leganes this weekend bidding to extend their lead in the La Liga title race. Hansi Flick’s treble-chasing side face a Leganes team battling to preserve their top-flight status. The Catalans enter the game on the back of a 4-0 thrashing of Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League quarter-finals. arts.ttl: For Messi, fairytale return to Barca looking increasingly unlikely
arts.sum: Lionel Messi’s current deal with Inter Miami is set to expire at the end of this year, but the rumors say that it is becoming more and more likely he will remain in Miami for the rest of his career. Inter Miami owner Jorge Mas: When Lionel Messi finishes his career, he will be a business partner for me, my brother and David Beckham.
